page.title: Rooms
page.subtitle: Rooms hold seat templates and can be reused across sessions

seatEditor.noAreas: Please add at least one area in "Price areas" before placing seats.
seatEditor.noAreasDisabledHint: No available area, cells are disabled.
seatEditor.fillAllTooltip: Set all {{rows}} × {{cols}} cells as normal seats in area {{areaId}}
seatEditor.hint: Click to cycle: empty → {{cycle}} → empty; drag to box-select; click row/col number to select whole row/col (Shift to extend); Esc to clear selection.

priceDrawer.title: Price areas
priceDrawer.hint: Independently manage price areas with custom areaId (e.g. VIP / A / Balcony). Areas referenced by seats cannot be deleted or renamed.
priceDrawer.empty: No areas yet. Click below to add one.
priceDrawer.areaIdPlaceholder: Area ID, e.g. VIP / A / Balcony
priceDrawer.errInvalidPrice: Default price of area {{id}} is invalid
priceDrawer.errInvalidOriginPrice: Origin price of area {{id}} is invalid
priceDrawer.errReferenced: Seats still reference area "{{id}}". Remove those seats first.
